variants: Jackal Alvarez is a prominent figure in the field of entomology, specializing in the study of insects and their environmental interactions. He is an active member of the Lichen Lorekeepers Society, where he collaborates with fellow enthusiasts and professionals. Under the mentorship of his doctoral advisor, Zahra Ghafouri, Jackal has honed his skills and knowledge. His research projects are primarily funded by the Osiris Ridge Grant, reflecting a strong commitment to advancing the study of insects. In addition, he holds a professional license known as the Vigilant Lightkeeper Title, indicating his dedication to ethical practices in scientific research.
